keyFacts: SvelteKit adapter is configured via sveltekit() inline options in apps/frontend/vite.config.ts; svelte.config.js is ignored (Vite prints: 'svelte.config.js is ignored when options are passed via your Vite config').

The pre-existing production behavior in hooks.server.ts redirects every non-tracker, non-/api route to /tracker. The auth gate had to explicitly resolve public paths before this redirect to avoid a /login <-> /tracker loop.

SvelteKit form actions return a JSON action-result (HTTP 200) for non-text/html Accept headers, and a real 303 for browser form navigations (Accept: text/html). Real browsers get the 303; only raw curl without Accept sees the 200 JSON envelope.
adapter-node enforces SvelteKit CSRF origin checking on POST; deployed nginx must forward a correct Host/Origin (standard config already in the deploy README).
Backend tests run against a shared Neon Postgres 'test_neondb'; concurrent test runs collide ('database is being accessed by other users'). Run exactly one suite at a time.
Backend test count is 197 (context doc said 97 — stale).
